skills.name: artifact-reading
skills.description: 统一读取 spec、design note、test report、review report 等工件，提取关键字段与约束，生成结构化摘要供当前角色使用

skills.name: context-summarization
skills.description: 上下文裁剪，防止膨胀，为执行层提供精简的上下文

skills.name: failure-analysis
skills.description: 失败根因分析，分类失败类型，为返工提供依据

skills.name: execution-reporting
skills.description: 统一输出执行结果，标准化 execution result 格式

skills.name: retry-strategy
skills.description: 智能返工策略选择，决定 CONTINUE/REWORK/REPLAN/ESCALATE

skills.name: requirement-to-design
skills.description: Transform feature specifications into structured technical design notes that define module boundaries, interface contracts, and implementation roadmaps

skills.name: module-boundary-design
skills.description: Define module boundaries, responsibilities, and dependencies for clean architecture

skills.name: tradeoff-analysis
skills.description: Document design decisions with alternatives, rationale, and trade-off analysis

skills.name: interface-contract-design
skills.description: Define API and data contracts with version strategy and error taxonomy

skills.name: migration-planning
skills.description: Design migration strategies with rollback requirements and risk assessment

skills.name: feature-implementation
skills.description: 指导 developer 按 task 描述和 design note 完成代码实现，输出可交付的代码变更和实现总结

skills.name: bugfix-workflow
skills.description: Bug 修复闭环流程，包括根因分析、修复实现、验证回归

skills.name: code-change-selfcheck
skills.description: 代码变更自检，确保实现符合约束和规范

skills.name: refactor-safely
skills.description: 安全重构流程，确保行为不变的前提下改进代码结构

skills.name: dependency-minimization
skills.description: 依赖最小化策略，减少不必要的依赖引入

skills.name: unit-test-design
skills.description: 单元测试设计，确保关键路径有测试覆盖

skills.name: regression-analysis
skills.description: 回归分析，评估代码变更的回归风险

skills.name: edge-case-matrix
skills.description: 边界条件矩阵，确保边界条件覆盖完整

skills.name: integration-test-design
skills.description: 集成测试设计，验证模块间协作正确性

skills.name: flaky-test-diagnosis
skills.description: 不稳定测试诊断，识别和修复偶发失败的测试

skills.name: performance-test-design
skills.description: 性能测试设计，定义性能测试场景和指标

skills.name: benchmark-analysis
skills.description: 基准测试分析，建立性能基线并跟踪变化

skills.name: load-test-orchestration
skills.description: 负载测试编排，设计和执行高并发测试场景

skills.name: performance-regression-analysis
skills.description: 性能回归分析，检测性能退化问题

skills.name: code-review-checklist
skills.description: 代码审查清单，确保审查覆盖关键质量点

skills.name: spec-implementation-diff
skills.description: Spec 与实现对比，验证实现符合规格要求

skills.name: reject-with-actionable-feedback
skills.description: 可执行反馈，提供清晰的修改建议而非模糊评价

skills.name: maintainability-review
skills.description: 可维护性审查，评估代码长期维护成本

skills.name: risk-review
skills.description: 风险评估审查，识别技术风险和业务风险

skills.name: readme-sync
skills.description: README 文档同步，确保 README 准确反映当前实现状态

skills.name: changelog-writing
skills.description: 变更日志编写，生成结构化的 changelog 条目

skills.name: architecture-doc-sync
skills.description: 架构文档同步，更新架构设计文档

skills.name: user-guide-update
skills.description: 用户指南更新，编写面向最终用户的使用文档

skills.name: auth-and-permission-review
skills.description: 认证权限审查，检查认证和授权逻辑安全性

skills.name: input-validation-review
skills.description: 输入验证审查，检查输入处理的安全性

skills.name: secret-handling-review
skills.description: 密钥处理审查，检查敏感信息的存储和使用

skills.name: dependency-risk-review
skills.description: 依赖风险审查，评估第三方依赖的安全风险
